spec: Holo Hub Phase 2b render path: the 4K BBB frame re-expressed as a κ-addressed point cloud streams chunk by chunk; each chunk re-derives to its declared κ (L5) before its points render; verified bytes persist in the OpfsKappaStore; the cloud materializes in WebGL2 and orbits. WebGPU compute-verify is the slot-in upgrade (absent in headless test browsers, so the WebGL2 Tier-B path is witnessed here).
